text: This chapter may be cited as the Texas Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.001 — Short Title

This chapter may be cited as the Texas Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter may be cited as the Texas Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
